Like 
It surely increases the damage you instantly deal on cards that **deal damage** AND apply poison
So it surely helps with cards that apply poison based on the damage dealt
But at the same time I'm not sure if it increases the poison dmg itself
it increases poison applied, it doesn't double dip and increase the damage poison deals
Makes sense
and yes, any 'temporary' effect is only for the current turn unless something specifically says otherwise
